name: che-transport-mcp
description: Real-time Taiwan transport queries via TDX — rail, bus, bike, air, traffic, parking
long_description: 21 MCP tools covering Taiwan's public-transport data across 6 modes: Rail (TRA / THSR / 6 metros), Bus (22 cities), Bike (YouBike 1.0 + 2.0), Air (FIDS), Traffic (freeway live + incidents + CCTV), and Parking (off-street). Backed by the TDX 運輸資料流通服務 API (free tier, 50 req/min). Read-only — no execution risk. Requires a free TDX account; run `make setup-tdx` after install.

tools.name: rail_list_systems
tools.description: List 8 supported rail systems (TRA / THSR / 4 metros / 2 LRTs)

tools.name: rail_search_stations
tools.description: Fuzzy station name search across rail systems (parallel fan-out)

tools.name: rail_find_trains
tools.description: Find trains by O/D + date (TRA / THSR)

tools.name: rail_status_train
tools.description: Live train delay/position

tools.name: rail_status_station
tools.description: Live station board (arrivals)

tools.name: bus_search_routes
tools.description: Fuzzy bus route search within a city

tools.name: bus_search_stops
tools.description: Fuzzy bus stop search within a city

tools.name: bus_find_routes
tools.description: O/D candidate routes via stop-of-route intersection

tools.name: bus_status_arrivals
tools.description: ETA at a bus stop

tools.name: bus_status_positions
tools.description: Live bus positions on a route

tools.name: bike_search_stations
tools.description: YouBike station name search; optional service-type filter

tools.name: bike_stations_nearby
tools.description: Haversine nearby YouBike stations with live availability

tools.name: bike_status_station
tools.description: Single-station live rent/return count

tools.name: air_list_airports
tools.description: Taiwan airport master (IATA codes)

tools.name: air_find_flights
tools.description: Schedule lookup by airport + Arrival/Departure

tools.name: air_status_flights
tools.description: Live FIDS board

tools.name: traffic_freeway_live
tools.description: Freeway section live speed / congestion

tools.name: traffic_incidents
tools.description: Traffic news / incidents with keyword filter

tools.name: traffic_cctv
tools.description: CCTV stream URLs along highways

tools.name: parking_list_lots
tools.description: Off-street car park master per city

tools.name: parking_status
tools.description: Live available-spaces lookup
